name: Bomb Bomb! My Friends
publisher: Burp Mimic, No Stuck Game Studio, Light of Creators
short_description: "Bomb Bomb! My Friends" is a 3D multiplayer bombing game where you can design your own level and then throw bombs with your friends to destroy it. Try not to fall and you will become the final winner.
detailed_description:
Recommended


About the Game

Test your operational ability, sense of space and ability to aim.

"Bomb Bomb! My Friends" is a 3D physical party game. In this game, you and your friends throw bombs to each other, and avoid the collapsing floors. The last player to fall will win.

You can build your own levels and play with friends. Upload your levels to the Internet, or play levels designed by other players.

Features

  • Cute cube style
  • Online play for up to 2~8 players
  • Single Challenge Mode, Challenge Your Limits
  • Level Editor
  • Share your level on the internet
  • More than 10 characters and 40 components
  • Various weather effects
